Intapp Netherlands B.V. (formerly known as TDI)

Stationstraat 20

6231 CL Meerssen

Netherlands

Account Name: INTAPP NETHERLANDS B.V. Account Number: 31259018 Account Currency: EUR Bank Name: Bank of America Europe Designated Activity Company, Amsterdam branch IBAN: NL39BOFA0031259018 Branch Swift Address: BOFANLNX
Please note: Payments in currencies other than EUR must be submitted via Wire Transfer. Payments in EUR can be processed via Wire or ACH. If you have any questions regarding this change or require additional information, please do not hesitate to contact us at ar@intapp.com.
